summary: Unified the R-0001 Cosmos weather atlas with the R-0002 orbital review route. Orbital planet, volumetric cloud, and ocean shaders now sample the shared weather/terrain-forcing atlas. Added fixed per-bookmark weather anchors, weather atlas controls, GIBS catalog/tile scripts, and Playwright screenshot automation path.
known_limits: The atlas is still the deterministic fallback, not live weather ingestion.
The GIBS endpoint could not be reached from this sandbox due DNS resolution failure; local Codex should retry.
Visual WebGL screenshots were not captured in this sandbox; Playwright automation is included for the local machine.
Underwater remains provisional until bathymetry/depth textures are wired.
next_recommended_patch: R-0004: first real GIBS raster overlay plus local screenshot review artifacts
